variants.title: Mann Filter C 11 005 Air Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P607345
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter C 11 005 Air Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P607345
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filters for clean air intake and optimum protection for your engine, mass air flow sensor & other sensitive components / They meet requirements of modern engine technology. Highest dirt holding capacity and dirt separation efficiency, low flow resistance and high pleat stability ensure functional reliability during the entire service interval.
specifications: Style: Air Filter, Dimension A: 83.0 mm, Dimension B: 54.0 mm, Dimension D: 83.0 mm, Dimension E: 109.4 mm, Dimension H: 186.7 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: ISO 5011, Outer Diameter: 108.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 56.4 mm, Length: 181.1 mm

variants.title: Donaldson P607345 Air Primary Finned
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P607345 Air Primary Finned is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.
specifications: Style: Air Primary Finned, Efficiency 1: ISO 5011, Outer Diameter: 108.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 56.4 mm, Length: 181.1 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: ISO 5011
